---
title: "Teaching & Service | Chuan (River) Zhu"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
description: "Teaching assistant experience, conference presentations, and academic service information for Chuan (River) Zhu."
author: "Chuan (River) Zhu"
keywords:
  - teaching assistant
  - operations management teaching
  - academic service
  - conference presentations
  - empirical operations management
---

::: {.home-page}

::: {.content-band}
<div class="eyebrow">Teaching & Service</div>

# Teaching & Service

This page summarizes my teaching experience, teaching assistant roles, conference presentations, and academic service. It is kept concise and will be updated as additional public information becomes available.

::: {.hero-links}
[Teaching](#teaching-experience){.link-button}
[Presentations](#conference-presentations){.link-button}
[Service](#reviewer-or-academic-service){.link-button}
[Homepage contact section](index.qmd#contact){.link-button}
:::
:::

::: {.content-band}
## Teaching Experience

My teaching experience is currently represented by teaching assistant roles across operations management, market analytics, economics, and entrepreneurship courses.

TODO: Add teaching interests, guest lectures, independent teaching, course evaluations, or teaching statement link when available.
:::

::: {.content-band}
## Teaching Assistant Roles

::: {.paper-list}
::: {.paper-entry}
### Operations Management

Teaching Assistant, MBA, Spring 2022.
:::

::: {.paper-entry}
### Data-Driven Market Analysis

Teaching Assistant, Master's, Fall 2021.
:::

::: {.paper-entry}
### Microeconomics

Teaching Assistant, Undergraduate, Spring 2019.
:::

::: {.paper-entry}
### Theories and Practices of Entrepreneurship

Teaching Assistant, Undergraduate, Spring 2019.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.content-band}
## Guest Lectures

TODO: Add guest lectures, invited classroom sessions, or teaching workshops if available.
:::

::: {.content-band}
## Conference Presentations

- **Agentic AI and Human-in-the-Loop Interventions: Field Experimental Evidence from Alibaba's Customer Service Operations.** POMS Annual Meeting, 2026.
- **Managing Front-office and Back-office Effort Allocation: Unpacking the Effects of Workload on Service Performance.** POMS-HK, 2026.
:::

::: {.content-band .contact-band}
## Reviewer or Academic Service

- TODO: Add reviewer service, including journal, conference, role, and year.
- TODO: Add conference service, such as session chair, discussant, organizer, or volunteer roles.
- TODO: Add departmental or university service if you want it shown publicly.
- TODO: Add professional memberships if relevant.
:::

:::
